fetchType: (method: string, url: string, body: unknown) => Promise<unknown>

fields.name: actor
fields.doc: Handle or DID of account to fetch profile of.

fields.name: q
fields.doc: Search query string. Syntax, phrase, boolean, and faceting is unspecified, but Lucene query syntax is recommended.

fields.name: q
fields.doc: Search query prefix; not a full query string.

fields.name: email
fields.doc: The user's email address to receive Age Assurance instructions.

fields.name: language
fields.doc: The user's preferred language for communication during the Age Assurance process.

fields.name: regionCode
fields.doc: An optional ISO 3166-2 code of the user's region or state within the country.

fields.name: countryCode
fields.doc: An ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code of the user's location.

fields.name: subject
fields.doc: The subject's DID to dismiss the match with.

fields.name: token
fields.doc: JWT to authenticate the call. Use the JWT received as a response to the call to `app.bsky.contact.verifyPhone`.

fields.name: to
fields.doc: The DID of who this notification should go to.

fields.name: from
fields.doc: The DID of who this notification comes from.

fields.name: phone
fields.doc: The phone number to receive the code via SMS.

fields.name: code
fields.doc: The code received via SMS as a result of the call to `app.bsky.contact.startPhoneVerification`.

fields.name: phone
fields.doc: The phone number to verify. Should be the same as the one passed to `app.bsky.contact.startPhoneVerification`.

fields.name: filter
fields.doc: Combinations of post/repost types to include in response.

fields.name: feed
fields.doc: AT-URI of the feed generator record.

fields.name: feed
fields.doc: Reference to feed generator record describing the specific feed being requested.

fields.name: cid
fields.doc: CID of the subject record (aka, specific version of record), to filter likes.

fields.name: uri
fields.doc: AT-URI of the subject (eg, a post record).

fields.name: list
fields.doc: Reference (AT-URI) to the list record.

fields.name: uri
fields.doc: Reference (AT-URI) to post record.

fields.name: depth
fields.doc: How many levels of reply depth should be included in response.

fields.name: parentHeight
fields.doc: How many levels of parent (and grandparent, etc) post to include.

fields.name: uris
fields.doc: List of post AT-URIs to return hydrated views for.

fields.name: cid
fields.doc: If supplied, filters to quotes of specific version (by CID) of the post record.

fields.name: uri
fields.doc: Reference (AT-URI) of post record

fields.name: cid
fields.doc: If supplied, filters to reposts of specific version (by CID) of the post record.

fields.name: uri
fields.doc: Reference (AT-URI) of post record

fields.name: algorithm
fields.doc: Variant 'algorithm' for timeline. Implementation-specific. NOTE: most feed flexibility has been moved to feed generator mechanism.

fields.name: q
fields.doc: Search query string; syntax, phrase, boolean, and faceting is unspecified, but Lucene query syntax is recommended.

fields.name: tag
fields.doc: Filter to posts with the given tag (hashtag), based on rich-text facet or tag field. Do not include the hash (#) prefix. Multiple tags can be specified, with 'AND' matching.

fields.name: url
fields.doc: Filter to posts with links (facet links or embeds) pointing to this URL. Server may apply URL normalization or fuzzy matching.

fields.name: lang
fields.doc: Filter to posts in the given language. Expected to be based on post language field, though server may override language detection.

fields.name: sort
fields.doc: Specifies the ranking order of results.

fields.name: since
fields.doc: Filter results for posts after the indicated datetime (inclusive). Expected to use 'sortAt' timestamp, which may not match 'createdAt'. Can be a datetime, or just an ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD).

fields.name: until
fields.doc: Filter results for posts before the indicated datetime (not inclusive). Expected to use 'sortAt' timestamp, which may not match 'createdAt'. Can be a datetime, or just an ISO date (YYY-MM-DD).

fields.name: author
fields.doc: Filter to posts by the given account. Handles are resolved to DID before query-time.

fields.name: cursor
fields.doc: Optional pagination mechanism; may not necessarily allow scrolling through entire result set.

fields.name: domain
fields.doc: Filter to posts with URLs (facet links or embeds) linking to the given domain (hostname). Server may apply hostname normalization.

fields.name: mentions
fields.doc: Filter to posts which mention the given account. Handles are resolved to DID before query-time. Only matches rich-text facet mentions.

fields.name: list
fields.doc: Reference (AT-URI) of the list record to hydrate.

fields.name: actor
fields.doc: The account (actor) to enumerate lists from.

fields.name: purposes
fields.doc: Optional filter by list purpose. If not specified, all supported types are returned.

fields.name: actor
fields.doc: The account (actor) to check for membership.

fields.name: purposes
fields.doc: Optional filter by list purpose. If not specified, all supported types are returned.

fields.name: actor
fields.doc: Primary account requesting relationships for.

fields.name: others
fields.doc: List of 'other' accounts to be related back to the primary.

fields.name: starterPack
fields.doc: Reference (AT-URI) of the starter pack record.

fields.name: actor
fields.doc: The account (actor) to check for membership.

fields.name: q
fields.doc: Search query string. Syntax, phrase, boolean, and faceting is unspecified, but Lucene query syntax is recommended.

fields.name: reasons
fields.doc: Notification reasons to include in response.

fields.name: ageRestricted
fields.doc: Set to true when the actor is age restricted

fields.name: note
fields.doc: Optional reason for disabled invites.

fields.name: note
fields.doc: Optional reason for enabled invites.

fields.name: comment
fields.doc: Additional comment by the sender that won't be used in the email itself but helpful to provide more context for moderators/reviewers

fields.name: account
fields.doc: The handle or DID of the repo.

fields.name: signingKey
fields.doc: Did-key formatted public key

fields.name: handle
fields.doc: The handle to resolve.

fields.name: token
fields.doc: A token received through com.atproto.identity.requestPlcOperationSignature

fields.name: handle
fields.doc: The new handle.

fields.name: sources
fields.doc: Optional list of label sources (DIDs) to filter on.

fields.name: uriPatterns
fields.doc: List of AT URI patterns to match (boolean 'OR'). Each may be a prefix (ending with '*'; will match inclusive of the string leading to '*'), or a full URI.

fields.name: reason
fields.doc: Additional context about the content and violation.

fields.name: repo
fields.doc: The handle or DID of the repo (aka, current account).

fields.name: validate
fields.doc: Can be set to 'false' to skip Lexicon schema validation of record data across all operations, 'true' to require it, or leave unset to validate only for known Lexicons.

fields.name: swapCommit
fields.doc: If provided, the entire operation will fail if the current repo commit CID does not match this value. Used to prevent conflicting repo mutations.

fields.name: repo
fields.doc: The handle or DID of the repo (aka, current account).

fields.name: rkey
fields.doc: The Record Key.

fields.name: validate
fields.doc: Can be set to 'false' to skip Lexicon schema validation of record data, 'true' to require it, or leave unset to validate only for known Lexicons.

fields.name: collection
fields.doc: The NSID of the record collection.

fields.name: swapCommit
fields.doc: Compare and swap with the previous commit by CID.

fields.name: repo
fields.doc: The handle or DID of the repo (aka, current account).

fields.name: rkey
fields.doc: The Record Key.

fields.name: collection
fields.doc: The NSID of the record collection.

fields.name: swapCommit
fields.doc: Compare and swap with the previous commit by CID.

fields.name: swapRecord
fields.doc: Compare and swap with the previous record by CID.

fields.name: repo
fields.doc: The handle or DID of the repo.

fields.name: cid
fields.doc: The CID of the version of the record. If not specified, then return the most recent version.

fields.name: repo
fields.doc: The handle or DID of the repo.

fields.name: rkey
fields.doc: The Record Key.

fields.name: collection
fields.doc: The NSID of the record collection.

fields.name: repo
fields.doc: The handle or DID of the repo.

fields.name: limit
fields.doc: The number of records to return.

fields.name: reverse
fields.doc: Flag to reverse the order of the returned records.

fields.name: collection
fields.doc: The NSID of the record type.

fields.name: repo
fields.doc: The handle or DID of the repo (aka, current account).

fields.name: rkey
fields.doc: The Record Key.

fields.name: validate
fields.doc: Can be set to 'false' to skip Lexicon schema validation of record data, 'true' to require it, or leave unset to validate only for known Lexicons.

fields.name: collection
fields.doc: The NSID of the record collection.

fields.name: swapCommit
fields.doc: Compare and swap with the previous commit by CID.

fields.name: swapRecord
fields.doc: Compare and swap with the previous record by CID. WARNING: nullable and optional field; may cause problems with golang implementation

fields.name: did
fields.doc: Pre-existing atproto DID, being imported to a new account.

fields.name: handle
fields.doc: Requested handle for the account.

fields.name: password
fields.doc: Initial account password. May need to meet instance-specific password strength requirements.

fields.name: recoveryKey
fields.doc: DID PLC rotation key (aka, recovery key) to be included in PLC creation operation.

fields.name: name
fields.doc: A short name for the App Password, to help distinguish them.

fields.name: privileged
fields.doc: If an app password has 'privileged' access to possibly sensitive account state. Meant for use with trusted clients.

fields.name: identifier
fields.doc: Handle or other identifier supported by the server for the authenticating user.

fields.name: allowTakendown
fields.doc: When true, instead of throwing error for takendown accounts, a valid response with a narrow scoped token will be returned

fields.name: deleteAfter
fields.doc: A recommendation to server as to how long they should hold onto the deactivated account before deleting.

fields.name: createAvailable
fields.doc: Controls whether any new 'earned' but not 'created' invites should be created.

fields.name: aud
fields.doc: The DID of the service that the token will be used to authenticate with

fields.name: exp
fields.doc: The time in Unix Epoch seconds that the JWT expires. Defaults to 60 seconds in the future. The service may enforce certain time bounds on tokens depending on the requested scope.

fields.name: lxm
fields.doc: Lexicon (XRPC) method to bind the requested token to

fields.name: did
fields.doc: The DID to reserve a key for.

fields.name: token
fields.doc: Requires a token from com.atproto.sever.requestEmailUpdate if the account's email has been confirmed.

fields.name: cid
fields.doc: The CID of the blob to fetch

fields.name: did
fields.doc: The DID of the account.

fields.name: did
fields.doc: The DID of the repo.

fields.name: hostname
fields.doc: Hostname of the host (eg, PDS or relay) being queried.

fields.name: did
fields.doc: The DID of the repo.

fields.name: did
fields.doc: The DID of the repo.

fields.name: rkey
fields.doc: Record Key

fields.name: did
fields.doc: The DID of the repo.

fields.name: since
fields.doc: The revision ('rev') of the repo to create a diff from.

fields.name: did
fields.doc: The DID of the repo.

fields.name: did
fields.doc: The DID of the repo.

fields.name: since
fields.doc: Optional revision of the repo to list blobs since.

fields.name: limit
fields.doc: Maximum size of response set. Recommend setting a large maximum (1000+) when enumerating large DID lists.

fields.name: hostname
fields.doc: Hostname of the current service (usually a PDS) that is notifying of update.

fields.name: hostname
fields.doc: Hostname of the current service (eg, PDS) that is requesting to be crawled.

sends.name: appBskyActorGetPreferences_send
sends.doc: Get private preferences attached to the current account. Expected use is synchronization between multiple devices, and import/export during account migration. Requires auth.

sends.name: appBskyActorGetProfile_send
sends.doc: Get detailed profile view of an actor. Does not require auth, but contains relevant metadata with auth.

sends.name: appBskyActorGetProfiles_send
sends.doc: Get detailed profile views of multiple actors.

sends.name: appBskyActorGetSuggestions_send
sends.doc: Get a list of suggested actors. Expected use is discovery of accounts to follow during new account onboarding.

sends.name: appBskyActorPutPreferences_send
sends.doc: Set the private preferences attached to the account.

sends.name: appBskyActorSearchActors_send
sends.doc: Find actors (profiles) matching search criteria. Does not require auth.

sends.name: appBskyActorSearchActorsTypeahead_send
sends.doc: Find actor suggestions for a prefix search term. Expected use is for auto-completion during text field entry. Does not require auth.

sends.name: appBskyAgeassuranceBegin_send
sends.doc: Initiate Age Assurance for an account.

sends.name: appBskyAgeassuranceGetConfig_send
sends.doc: Returns Age Assurance configuration for use on the client.

sends.name: appBskyAgeassuranceGetState_send
sends.doc: Returns server-computed Age Assurance state, if available, and any additional metadata needed to compute Age Assurance state client-side.

sends.name: appBskyBookmarkCreateBookmark_send
sends.doc: Creates a private bookmark for the specified record. Currently, only `app.bsky.feed.post` records are supported. Requires authentication.

sends.name: appBskyBookmarkDeleteBookmark_send
sends.doc: Deletes a private bookmark for the specified record. Currently, only `app.bsky.feed.post` records are supported. Requires authentication.

sends.name: appBskyBookmarkGetBookmarks_send
sends.doc: Gets views of records bookmarked by the authenticated user. Requires authentication.

sends.name: appBskyContactDismissMatch_send
sends.doc: Removes a match that was found via contact import. It shouldn't appear again if the same contact is re-imported. Requires authentication.

sends.name: appBskyContactGetMatches_send
sends.doc: Returns the matched contacts (contacts that were mutually imported). Excludes dismissed matches. Requires authentication.

sends.name: appBskyContactGetSyncStatus_send
sends.doc: Gets the user's current contact import status. Requires authentication.

sends.name: appBskyContactImportContacts_send
sends.doc: Import contacts for securely matching with other users. This follows the protocol explained in https://docs.bsky.app/blog/contact-import-rfc. Requires authentication.

sends.name: appBskyContactRemoveData_send
sends.doc: Removes all stored hashes used for contact matching, existing matches, and sync status. Requires authentication.

sends.name: appBskyContactSendNotification_send
sends.doc: System endpoint to send notifications related to contact imports. Requires role authentication.

sends.name: appBskyContactStartPhoneVerification_send
sends.doc: Starts a phone verification flow. The phone passed will receive a code via SMS that should be passed to `app.bsky.contact.verifyPhone`. Requires authentication.

sends.name: appBskyContactVerifyPhone_send
sends.doc: Verifies control over a phone number with a code received via SMS and starts a contact import session. Requires authentication.

sends.name: appBskyDraftCreateDraft_send
sends.doc: Inserts a draft using private storage (stash). An upper limit of drafts might be enforced. Requires authentication.

sends.name: appBskyDraftDeleteDraft_send
sends.doc: Deletes a draft by ID. Requires authentication.

sends.name: appBskyDraftGetDrafts_send
sends.doc: Gets views of user drafts. Requires authentication.

sends.name: appBskyDraftUpdateDraft_send
sends.doc: Updates a draft using private storage (stash). If the draft ID points to a non-existing ID, the update will be silently ignored. This is done because updates don't enforce draft limit, so it accepts all writes, but will ignore invalid ones. Requires authentication.

sends.name: appBskyFeedDescribeFeedGenerator_send
sends.doc: Get information about a feed generator, including policies and offered feed URIs. Does not require auth; implemented by Feed Generator services (not App View).

sends.name: appBskyFeedGetActorFeeds_send
sends.doc: Get a list of feeds (feed generator records) created by the actor (in the actor's repo).

sends.name: appBskyFeedGetActorLikes_send
sends.doc: Get a list of posts liked by an actor. Requires auth, actor must be the requesting account.

sends.name: appBskyFeedGetAuthorFeed_send
sends.doc: Get a view of an actor's 'author feed' (post and reposts by the author). Does not require auth.

sends.name: appBskyFeedGetFeed_send
sends.doc: Get a hydrated feed from an actor's selected feed generator. Implemented by App View.

sends.name: appBskyFeedGetFeedGenerator_send
sends.doc: Get information about a feed generator. Implemented by AppView.

sends.name: appBskyFeedGetFeedGenerators_send
sends.doc: Get information about a list of feed generators.

sends.name: appBskyFeedGetFeedSkeleton_send
sends.doc: Get a skeleton of a feed provided by a feed generator. Auth is optional, depending on provider requirements, and provides the DID of the requester. Implemented by Feed Generator Service.

sends.name: appBskyFeedGetLikes_send
sends.doc: Get like records which reference a subject (by AT-URI and CID).

sends.name: appBskyFeedGetListFeed_send
sends.doc: Get a feed of recent posts from a list (posts and reposts from any actors on the list). Does not require auth.

sends.name: appBskyFeedGetPostThread_send
sends.doc: Get posts in a thread. Does not require auth, but additional metadata and filtering will be applied for authed requests.

sends.name: appBskyFeedGetPosts_send
sends.doc: Gets post views for a specified list of posts (by AT-URI). This is sometimes referred to as 'hydrating' a 'feed skeleton'.

sends.name: appBskyFeedGetQuotes_send
sends.doc: Get a list of quotes for a given post.

sends.name: appBskyFeedGetRepostedBy_send
sends.doc: Get a list of reposts for a given post.

sends.name: appBskyFeedGetSuggestedFeeds_send
sends.doc: Get a list of suggested feeds (feed generators) for the requesting account.

sends.name: appBskyFeedGetTimeline_send
sends.doc: Get a view of the requesting account's home timeline. This is expected to be some form of reverse-chronological feed.

sends.name: appBskyFeedSearchPosts_send
sends.doc: Find posts matching search criteria, returning views of those posts. Note that this API endpoint may require authentication (eg, not public) for some service providers and implementations.

sends.name: appBskyFeedSendInteractions_send
sends.doc: Send information about interactions with feed items back to the feed generator that served them.

sends.name: appBskyGraphGetActorStarterPacks_send
sends.doc: Get a list of starter packs created by the actor.

sends.name: appBskyGraphGetBlocks_send
sends.doc: Enumerates which accounts the requesting account is currently blocking. Requires auth.

sends.name: appBskyGraphGetFollowers_send
sends.doc: Enumerates accounts which follow a specified account (actor).

sends.name: appBskyGraphGetFollows_send
sends.doc: Enumerates accounts which a specified account (actor) follows.

sends.name: appBskyGraphGetKnownFollowers_send
sends.doc: Enumerates accounts which follow a specified account (actor) and are followed by the viewer.

sends.name: appBskyGraphGetList_send
sends.doc: Gets a 'view' (with additional context) of a specified list.

sends.name: appBskyGraphGetListBlocks_send
sends.doc: Get mod lists that the requesting account (actor) is blocking. Requires auth.

sends.name: appBskyGraphGetListMutes_send
sends.doc: Enumerates mod lists that the requesting account (actor) currently has muted. Requires auth.

sends.name: appBskyGraphGetLists_send
sends.doc: Enumerates the lists created by a specified account (actor).

sends.name: appBskyGraphGetListsWithMembership_send
sends.doc: Enumerates the lists created by the session user, and includes membership information about `actor` in those lists. Only supports curation and moderation lists (no reference lists, used in starter packs). Requires auth.

sends.name: appBskyGraphGetMutes_send
sends.doc: Enumerates accounts that the requesting account (actor) currently has muted. Requires auth.

sends.name: appBskyGraphGetRelationships_send
sends.doc: Enumerates public relationships between one account, and a list of other accounts. Does not require auth.

sends.name: appBskyGraphGetStarterPack_send
sends.doc: Gets a view of a starter pack.

sends.name: appBskyGraphGetStarterPacks_send
sends.doc: Get views for a list of starter packs.

sends.name: appBskyGraphGetStarterPacksWithMembership_send
sends.doc: Enumerates the starter packs created by the session user, and includes membership information about `actor` in those starter packs. Requires auth.

sends.name: appBskyGraphGetSuggestedFollowsByActor_send
sends.doc: Enumerates follows similar to a given account (actor). Expected use is to recommend additional accounts immediately after following one account.

sends.name: appBskyGraphMuteActor_send
sends.doc: Creates a mute relationship for the specified account. Mutes are private in Bluesky. Requires auth.

sends.name: appBskyGraphMuteActorList_send
sends.doc: Creates a mute relationship for the specified list of accounts. Mutes are private in Bluesky. Requires auth.

sends.name: appBskyGraphMuteThread_send
sends.doc: Mutes a thread preventing notifications from the thread and any of its children. Mutes are private in Bluesky. Requires auth.

sends.name: appBskyGraphSearchStarterPacks_send
sends.doc: Find starter packs matching search criteria. Does not require auth.

sends.name: appBskyGraphUnmuteActor_send
sends.doc: Unmutes the specified account. Requires auth.

sends.name: appBskyGraphUnmuteActorList_send
sends.doc: Unmutes the specified list of accounts. Requires auth.

sends.name: appBskyGraphUnmuteThread_send
sends.doc: Unmutes the specified thread. Requires auth.

sends.name: appBskyLabelerGetServices_send
sends.doc: Get information about a list of labeler services.

sends.name: appBskyNotificationGetPreferences_send
sends.doc: Get notification-related preferences for an account. Requires auth.

sends.name: appBskyNotificationGetUnreadCount_send
sends.doc: Count the number of unread notifications for the requesting account. Requires auth.

sends.name: appBskyNotificationListActivitySubscriptions_send
sends.doc: Enumerate all accounts to which the requesting account is subscribed to receive notifications for. Requires auth.

sends.name: appBskyNotificationListNotifications_send
sends.doc: Enumerate notifications for the requesting account. Requires auth.

sends.name: appBskyNotificationPutActivitySubscription_send
sends.doc: Puts an activity subscription entry. The key should be omitted for creation and provided for updates. Requires auth.

sends.name: appBskyNotificationPutPreferences_send
sends.doc: Set notification-related preferences for an account. Requires auth.

sends.name: appBskyNotificationPutPreferencesV2_send
sends.doc: Set notification-related preferences for an account. Requires auth.

sends.name: appBskyNotificationRegisterPush_send
sends.doc: Register to receive push notifications, via a specified service, for the requesting account. Requires auth.

sends.name: appBskyNotificationUnregisterPush_send
sends.doc: The inverse of registerPush - inform a specified service that push notifications should no longer be sent to the given token for the requesting account. Requires auth.

sends.name: appBskyNotificationUpdateSeen_send
sends.doc: Notify server that the requesting account has seen notifications. Requires auth.

sends.name: appBskyVideoGetJobStatus_send
sends.doc: Get status details for a video processing job.

sends.name: appBskyVideoGetUploadLimits_send
sends.doc: Get video upload limits for the authenticated user.

sends.name: appBskyVideoUploadVideo_send
sends.doc: Upload a video to be processed then stored on the PDS.

sends.name: comAtprotoAdminDeleteAccount_send
sends.doc: Delete a user account as an administrator.

sends.name: comAtprotoAdminDisableAccountInvites_send
sends.doc: Disable an account from receiving new invite codes, but does not invalidate existing codes.

sends.name: comAtprotoAdminDisableInviteCodes_send
sends.doc: Disable some set of codes and/or all codes associated with a set of users.

sends.name: comAtprotoAdminEnableAccountInvites_send
sends.doc: Re-enable an account's ability to receive invite codes.

sends.name: comAtprotoAdminGetAccountInfo_send
sends.doc: Get details about an account.

sends.name: comAtprotoAdminGetAccountInfos_send
sends.doc: Get details about some accounts.

sends.name: comAtprotoAdminGetInviteCodes_send
sends.doc: Get an admin view of invite codes.

sends.name: comAtprotoAdminGetSubjectStatus_send
sends.doc: Get the service-specific admin status of a subject (account, record, or blob).

sends.name: comAtprotoAdminSearchAccounts_send
sends.doc: Get list of accounts that matches your search query.

sends.name: comAtprotoAdminSendEmail_send
sends.doc: Send email to a user's account email address.

sends.name: comAtprotoAdminUpdateAccountEmail_send
sends.doc: Administrative action to update an account's email.

sends.name: comAtprotoAdminUpdateAccountHandle_send
sends.doc: Administrative action to update an account's handle.

sends.name: comAtprotoAdminUpdateAccountPassword_send
sends.doc: Update the password for a user account as an administrator.

sends.name: comAtprotoAdminUpdateAccountSigningKey_send
sends.doc: Administrative action to update an account's signing key in their Did document.

sends.name: comAtprotoAdminUpdateSubjectStatus_send
sends.doc: Update the service-specific admin status of a subject (account, record, or blob).

sends.name: comAtprotoIdentityGetRecommendedDidCredentials_send
sends.doc: Describe the credentials that should be included in the DID doc of an account that is migrating to this service.

sends.name: comAtprotoIdentityRefreshIdentity_send
sends.doc: Request that the server re-resolve an identity (DID and handle). The server may ignore this request, or require authentication, depending on the role, implementation, and policy of the server.

sends.name: comAtprotoIdentityRequestPlcOperationSignature_send
sends.doc: Request an email with a code to in order to request a signed PLC operation. Requires Auth.

sends.name: comAtprotoIdentityResolveHandle_send
sends.doc: Resolves an atproto handle (hostname) to a DID. Does not necessarily bi-directionally verify against the the DID document.

sends.name: comAtprotoIdentitySignPlcOperation_send
sends.doc: Signs a PLC operation to update some value(s) in the requesting DID's document.

sends.name: comAtprotoIdentitySubmitPlcOperation_send
sends.doc: Validates a PLC operation to ensure that it doesn't violate a service's constraints or get the identity into a bad state, then submits it to the PLC registry

sends.name: comAtprotoIdentityUpdateHandle_send
sends.doc: Updates the current account's handle. Verifies handle validity, and updates did:plc document if necessary. Implemented by PDS, and requires auth.

sends.name: comAtprotoLabelQueryLabels_send
sends.doc: Find labels relevant to the provided AT-URI patterns. Public endpoint for moderation services, though may return different or additional results with auth.

sends.name: comAtprotoModerationCreateReport_send
sends.doc: Submit a moderation report regarding an atproto account or record. Implemented by moderation services (with PDS proxying), and requires auth.

sends.name: comAtprotoRepoApplyWrites_send
sends.doc: Apply a batch transaction of repository creates, updates, and deletes. Requires auth, implemented by PDS.

sends.name: comAtprotoRepoCreateRecord_send
sends.doc: Create a single new repository record. Requires auth, implemented by PDS.

sends.name: comAtprotoRepoDeleteRecord_send
sends.doc: Delete a repository record, or ensure it doesn't exist. Requires auth, implemented by PDS.

sends.name: comAtprotoRepoDescribeRepo_send
sends.doc: Get information about an account and repository, including the list of collections. Does not require auth.

sends.name: comAtprotoRepoGetRecord_send
sends.doc: Get a single record from a repository. Does not require auth.

sends.name: comAtprotoRepoImportRepo_send
sends.doc: Import a repo in the form of a CAR file. Requires Content-Length HTTP header to be set.

sends.name: comAtprotoRepoListMissingBlobs_send
sends.doc: Returns a list of missing blobs for the requesting account. Intended to be used in the account migration flow.

sends.name: comAtprotoRepoListRecords_send
sends.doc: List a range of records in a repository, matching a specific collection. Does not require auth.

sends.name: comAtprotoRepoPutRecord_send
sends.doc: Write a repository record, creating or updating it as needed. Requires auth, implemented by PDS.

sends.name: comAtprotoRepoUploadBlob_send
sends.doc: Upload a new blob, to be referenced from a repository record. The blob will be deleted if it is not referenced within a time window (eg, minutes). Blob restrictions (mimetype, size, etc) are enforced when the reference is created. Requires auth, implemented by PDS.

sends.name: comAtprotoServerActivateAccount_send
sends.doc: Activates a currently deactivated account. Used to finalize account migration after the account's repo is imported and identity is setup.

sends.name: comAtprotoServerCheckAccountStatus_send
sends.doc: Returns the status of an account, especially as pertaining to import or recovery. Can be called many times over the course of an account migration. Requires auth and can only be called pertaining to oneself.

sends.name: comAtprotoServerConfirmEmail_send
sends.doc: Confirm an email using a token from com.atproto.server.requestEmailConfirmation.

sends.name: comAtprotoServerCreateAccount_send
sends.doc: Create an account. Implemented by PDS.

sends.name: comAtprotoServerCreateAppPassword_send
sends.doc: Create an App Password.

sends.name: comAtprotoServerCreateInviteCode_send
sends.doc: Create an invite code.

sends.name: comAtprotoServerCreateInviteCodes_send
sends.doc: Create invite codes.

sends.name: comAtprotoServerCreateSession_send
sends.doc: Create an authentication session.

sends.name: comAtprotoServerDeactivateAccount_send
sends.doc: Deactivates a currently active account. Stops serving of repo, and future writes to repo until reactivated. Used to finalize account migration with the old host after the account has been activated on the new host.

sends.name: comAtprotoServerDeleteAccount_send
sends.doc: Delete an actor's account with a token and password. Can only be called after requesting a deletion token. Requires auth.

sends.name: comAtprotoServerDeleteSession_send
sends.doc: Delete the current session. Requires auth using the 'refreshJwt' (not the 'accessJwt').

sends.name: comAtprotoServerDescribeServer_send
sends.doc: Describes the server's account creation requirements and capabilities. Implemented by PDS.

sends.name: comAtprotoServerGetAccountInviteCodes_send
sends.doc: Get all invite codes for the current account. Requires auth.

sends.name: comAtprotoServerGetServiceAuth_send
sends.doc: Get a signed token on behalf of the requesting DID for the requested service.

sends.name: comAtprotoServerGetSession_send
sends.doc: Get information about the current auth session. Requires auth.

sends.name: comAtprotoServerListAppPasswords_send
sends.doc: List all App Passwords.

sends.name: comAtprotoServerRefreshSession_send
sends.doc: Refresh an authentication session. Requires auth using the 'refreshJwt' (not the 'accessJwt').

sends.name: comAtprotoServerRequestAccountDelete_send
sends.doc: Initiate a user account deletion via email.

sends.name: comAtprotoServerRequestEmailConfirmation_send
sends.doc: Request an email with a code to confirm ownership of email.

sends.name: comAtprotoServerRequestEmailUpdate_send
sends.doc: Request a token in order to update email.

sends.name: comAtprotoServerRequestPasswordReset_send
sends.doc: Initiate a user account password reset via email.

sends.name: comAtprotoServerReserveSigningKey_send
sends.doc: Reserve a repo signing key, for use with account creation. Necessary so that a DID PLC update operation can be constructed during an account migraiton. Public and does not require auth; implemented by PDS. NOTE: this endpoint may change when full account migration is implemented.

sends.name: comAtprotoServerResetPassword_send
sends.doc: Reset a user account password using a token.

sends.name: comAtprotoServerRevokeAppPassword_send
sends.doc: Revoke an App Password by name.

sends.name: comAtprotoServerUpdateEmail_send
sends.doc: Update an account's email.

sends.name: comAtprotoSyncGetBlob_send
sends.doc: Get a blob associated with a given account. Returns the full blob as originally uploaded. Does not require auth; implemented by PDS.

sends.name: comAtprotoSyncGetBlocks_send
sends.doc: Get data blocks from a given repo, by CID. For example, intermediate MST nodes, or records. Does not require auth; implemented by PDS.

sends.name: comAtprotoSyncGetHostStatus_send
sends.doc: Returns information about a specified upstream host, as consumed by the server. Implemented by relays.

sends.name: comAtprotoSyncGetLatestCommit_send
sends.doc: Get the current commit CID & revision of the specified repo. Does not require auth.

sends.name: comAtprotoSyncGetRecord_send
sends.doc: Get data blocks needed to prove the existence or non-existence of record in the current version of repo. Does not require auth.

sends.name: comAtprotoSyncGetRepo_send
sends.doc: Download a repository export as CAR file. Optionally only a 'diff' since a previous revision. Does not require auth; implemented by PDS.

sends.name: comAtprotoSyncGetRepoStatus_send
sends.doc: Get the hosting status for a repository, on this server. Expected to be implemented by PDS and Relay.

sends.name: comAtprotoSyncListBlobs_send
sends.doc: List blob CIDs for an account, since some repo revision. Does not require auth; implemented by PDS.

sends.name: comAtprotoSyncListHosts_send
sends.doc: Enumerates upstream hosts (eg, PDS or relay instances) that this service consumes from. Implemented by relays.

sends.name: comAtprotoSyncListRepos_send
sends.doc: Enumerates all the DID, rev, and commit CID for all repos hosted by this service. Does not require auth; implemented by PDS and Relay.

sends.name: comAtprotoSyncListReposByCollection_send
sends.doc: Enumerates all the DIDs which have records with the given collection NSID.

sends.name: comAtprotoSyncNotifyOfUpdate_send
sends.doc: Notify a crawling service of a recent update, and that crawling should resume. Intended use is after a gap between repo stream events caused the crawling service to disconnect. Does not require auth; implemented by Relay. DEPRECATED: just use com.atproto.sync.requestCrawl

sends.name: comAtprotoSyncRequestCrawl_send
sends.doc: Request a service to persistently crawl hosted repos. Expected use is new PDS instances declaring their existence to Relays. Does not require auth.
